title: Task CRUD with pagination, done-filter, and project isolation
body:
## Goal
Add create/list/update/delete for tasks within an owned project, with paginated and done-filtered listing and strict rejection of access to tasks in projects the caller does not own.

## Changes
- {"path":"src/routes/tasks.js","assumption":"creates"}
- {"path":"tests/tasks.test.js","assumption":"creates"}

## Acceptance
- [ ] POST /projects/:projectId/tasks with {"title"} (and optional "assigneeId") in an owned project returns the created task as {id, title, projectId, assigneeId, createdAt, done:false}.
- [ ] GET /projects/:projectId/tasks returns {items, total, page, pageSize}, honoring ?page and ?pageSize to page the results.
- [ ] GET /projects/:projectId/tasks?done=true and ?done=false filter the returned items to tasks matching the requested done state.
- [ ] PATCH /projects/:projectId/tasks/:taskId with {"title"} and/or {"done"} updates those fields and responds with the updated task.
- [ ] DELETE /projects/:projectId/tasks/:taskId removes the task from its project.
- [ ] Every task endpoint rejects access (404/403) to tasks in a project the caller does not own, and requires a valid bearer token (401 otherwise).

## Verify
- node --test tests/tasks.test.js (contract)
- npm run typecheck (validate)

> 🏷️ Authored with Mandrel v0.0.0 · 2026-07-12

<!-- meta: {"reason_to_exist":"Task management adds pagination/filtering and a second isolation layer (task under owned project) with its own failure modes (b: isolates task pagination/filter and cross-project isolation into its own reviewable unit).","mandrel_version":"0.0.0","authored_at":"2026-07-12"} -->
